prompt: Polish this memo for executive readability. Apply BLUF framework. Save to outputs/polished-memo.md

assertions.name: bluf_applied
assertions.description: First paragraph leads with the bottom line (decision/action needed), not a status preamble

assertions.name: paragraph_length
assertions.description: No paragraph exceeds 5 sentences or approximately 70 words

assertions.name: bold_anchoring
assertions.description: Key metrics (75%, $450K, Q2, 6 months) have bold formatting around them

assertions.name: memo_header_format
assertions.description: Document uses proper memo header format (TO/FROM/DATE/SUBJECT lines) rather than generic markdown H1 heading

assertions.name: visual_element_rhythm
assertions.description: Contains at least one table or callout block breaking up consecutive prose

assertions.name: sentence_conciseness
assertions.description: Average sentence length is 15-20 words (not 25+ academic-style)
